titleZh: 在 Claude Code 中构建自进化 Agent 机制
titleEn: Building a Self-Evolving Agent Mechanism in Claude Code
introZh: 如果 Agent 每次执行完任务就结束，它永远只是一次性工具。本文从产品经理视角拆解如何在 Claude Code 中构建“会复盘、会记忆、会优化”的自进化机制，让 Agent 越用越强。
introEn: If an agent stops learning when a task ends, it remains a one-off tool. This article explains, from a PM perspective, how to build a self-evolving mechanism in Claude Code so the agent can reflect, remember, and improve over time.
